intention: 就某事给出反馈或评价
avoidSaying: give feedback about / give feedback for
sentencePatterns: Can you give me feedback on ...?
I'll give you feedback on ... after ...
She gave feedback on ... during the meeting.
realLifeExamples: Can you give me feedback on my essay before I submit it?
The manager gave feedback on the team's performance at the review.
Please give feedback on the new design so we can improve it.
productionPrompts: 用 give feedback on 造一句和工作或学习有关的句子。
grammarNote: 'on' here means 'about/regarding a specific topic'. Same pattern: give advice on, comment on, write a report on, give a lecture on — 'on' points the action at a subject.
